t.t-if: company.partner_id.street2 or company.partner_id.city or company.partner_id.zip or company.partner_id.state_id or company.partner_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
company.partner_id.city or company.partner_id.zip or company.partner_id.state_id or company.partner_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
company.partner_id.zip or company.partner_id.state_id or company.partner_id.country_id and res_config.show_country

t.t-value: res_config if res_config.ks_custom_water_mark_setting else company

div.t-if: o.picking_type_id.code != 'internal' and (not o.move_ids_without_package or not o.move_ids_without_package[0].partner_id) and o.picking_type_id.warehouse_id.partner_id

t.t-value: o.move_lines.filtered(lambda x: x.product_uom_qty != x.reserved_availability and x.move_line_ids and x.state!='done')

div.p: All products could not be reserved. Click on the "Check Availability" button to try to reserve products.

t.t-if: company.partner_id.street2 or company.partner_id.city or company.partner_id.zip or company.partner_id.state_id or company.partner_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
company.partner_id.city or company.partner_id.zip or company.partner_id.state_id or company.partner_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
company.partner_id.zip or company.partner_id.state_id or company.partner_id.country_id and res_config.show_country

t.t-value: res_config if res_config.ks_custom_water_mark_setting else company

div.t-if: o.picking_type_id.code != 'internal' and (not o.move_ids_without_package or not o.move_ids_without_package[0].partner_id) and o.picking_type_id.warehouse_id.partner_id

t.t-value: o.move_lines.filtered(lambda x: x.product_uom_qty != x.reserved_availability and x.move_line_ids and x.state!='done')

div.p: All products could not be reserved. Click on the "Check Availability" button to try to reserve products.

t.t-if: company.partner_id.street2 or company.partner_id.city or company.partner_id.zip or company.partner_id.state_id or company.partner_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
company.partner_id.city or company.partner_id.zip or company.partner_id.state_id or company.partner_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
company.partner_id.zip or company.partner_id.state_id or company.partner_id.country_id and res_config.show_country

t.t-value: res_config if res_config.ks_custom_water_mark_setting else company

div.class: col-5 my-3 border-bottom border-right px-2 ks_invoice

div.t-if: o.picking_type_id.code != 'internal' and (not o.move_ids_without_package or not o.move_ids_without_package[0].partner_id) and o.picking_type_id.warehouse_id.partner_id
o.picking_type_id.code != 'internal' and (not o.move_ids_without_package or not o.move_ids_without_package[0].partner_id) and o.picking_type_id.warehouse_id.partner_id

div.class: col-5 offset-1 my-3 my-3 px-2 ks_invoice

t.t-value: o.move_lines.filtered(lambda x: x.product_uom_qty != x.reserved_availability and x.move_line_ids and x.state!='done')

div.p: All products could not be reserved. Click on the "Check Availability" button to try to reserve products.

company.partner_id.city or company.partner_id.zip or company.partner_id.state_id or company.partner_id.country_id and res_config.show_country

company.partner_id.city or company.partner_id.zip or company.partner_id.state_id or company.partner_id.country_id and res_config.show_country

div.t-if: o.picking_type_id.code != 'internal' and (not o.move_ids_without_package or not o.move_ids_without_package[0].partner_id) and o.picking_type_id.warehouse_id.partner_id

company.partner_id.zip or company.partner_id.state_id or company.partner_id.country_id and res_config.show_country

div.t-if: o.picking_type_id.code != 'internal' and (not o.move_ids_without_package or not o.move_ids_without_package[0].partner_id) and o.picking_type_id.warehouse_id.partner_id

div.class: col-6 my-3 border-bottom border-right px-2 ks_invoice

div.t-if: o.picking_type_id.code != 'internal' and (not o.move_ids_without_package or not o.move_ids_without_package[0].partner_id) and o.picking_type_id.warehouse_id.partner_id

t.t-value: o.move_lines.filtered(lambda x: x.product_uom_qty != x.reserved_availability and x.move_line_ids and x.state!='done')

div.p: All products could not be reserved. Click on the "Check Availability" button to try to reserve products.

div.class: mt-3 d-block float-left d-block text-left ks_invoice_number

t.t-if: company.partner_id.street2 or company.partner_id.city or company.partner_id.zip or company.partner_id.state_id or company.partner_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
company.partner_id.city or company.partner_id.zip or company.partner_id.state_id or company.partner_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
company.partner_id.zip or company.partner_id.state_id or company.partner_id.country_id and res_config.show_country

t.t-value: res_config if res_config.ks_custom_water_mark_setting else company

div.class: col-6 my-3 border-bottom border-right px-2 ks_invoice

div.t-if: o.picking_type_id.code != 'internal' and (not o.move_ids_without_package or not o.move_ids_without_package[0].partner_id) and o.picking_type_id.warehouse_id.partner_id

t.t-value: o.move_lines.filtered(lambda x: x.product_uom_qty != x.reserved_availability and x.move_line_ids and x.state!='done')

div.p: All products could not be reserved. Click on the "Check Availability" button to try to reserve products.

t.t-if: company.partner_id.street2 or company.partner_id.city or company.partner_id.zip or company.partner_id.state_id or company.partner_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
company.partner_id.city or company.partner_id.zip or company.partner_id.state_id or company.partner_id.country_id and res_config.show_country

div.t-if: o.picking_type_id.code != 'internal' and (not o.move_ids_without_package or not o.move_ids_without_package[0].partner_id) and o.picking_type_id.warehouse_id.partner_id

t.t-value: o.move_lines.filtered(lambda x: x.product_uom_qty != x.reserved_availability and x.move_line_ids and x.state!='done')

div.p: All products could not be reserved. Click on the "Check Availability" button to try to reserve products.

table.t-attf-class: #{'ks_table_pick-1' if ks_style == 'ks_style_4' else 'ks_table_pick' if ks_style == 'ks_style_7' else ''} #{'ks_table' if ks_style not in [ 'ks_style_4', 'ks_style_7'] else ''}

t.t-value: any(move_line.product_id and move_line.product_id.sudo().barcode or move_line.package_id for move_line in o.move_line_ids)
any(move_line.lot_id or move_line.lot_name for move_line in o.move_line_ids)

thead.t-attf-class: #{'border-top border-bottom' if ks_style == 'ks_style_10' else ''} #{'custom-table-header' if ks_style == 'ks_style_4' else ''}

th.name: th_product
th.t-attf-class: #{'ks_table_design_4' if ks_style in ['ks_style_4','ks_style_7'] else ''} ks_table_head_backgrnd_color ks_table_head_text_color ks_table_head_text_size

table.t-attf-class: #{'ks_table_pick-1' if ks_style == 'ks_style_4' else 'ks_table_pick' if ks_style == 'ks_style_7' else ''} #{'ks_table' if ks_style not in [ 'ks_style_4', 'ks_style_7'] else ''}
table.t-if: o.package_level_ids and o.picking_type_entire_packs and o.state in ['assigned', 'done']

th.name: th_pko_from
th.t-attf-class: #{'ks_table_design_4' if ks_style in ['ks_style_4','ks_style_7'] else ''} ks_table_head_backgrnd_color ks_table_head_text_color ks_table_head_text_size
